not_a_verdict: This is an incident diagnostic, NOT a PASS or HEALTHY receipt. Proof-ledger promotion only after independent verification (author != verifier). SUBMITTED for independent verification.
location_note: Deliberately under receipts/incident/ (NOT receipts/proof/) — it is not a proof-grade receipt.
corrected_finding: Dispatch remained active, while per-loop completion evidence became stale.
explicitly_not_claimed: All loops continued executing successfully. (The evidence proves continued DISPATCH, not confirmed per-loop COMPLETION during the receipt gap.)

evidence_by_source_table.noos_loop_registry.last_fired_at: dispatch heartbeat — remained FRESH throughout the window (execution dispatch signal)
evidence_by_source_table.noos_deadman_runs (append-only): 14 consecutive 30-min runs 2026-07-16T22:30:50Z..2026-07-17T04:00:52Z, every one stale_count=0, restarts=0
evidence_by_source_table.noetfield_factory_cycle_runs (writer A,: continuous ~10-min cadence through the window; never gapped
evidence_by_source_table.noetfield_factory_cycle_runs (writer B,: last pre-gap rows 2026-07-16T23:32:03..07Z; SILENT until 2026-07-17T03:39:51Z; resumed 03:50:20Z (rows labeled cloud_trigger=noos_integrator_repair)

what_the_old_cockpit_did_wrong: Collapsed writer-B (completion-receipt) staleness into BLOCKED_WITH_REASON + success_rate=0.0, reporting 'loop failed / not healthy' when the true state was 'dispatch active, completion evidence unavailable'. This is fixed by the dual-signal status model in this task (DISPATCHING_COMPLETION_UNPROVEN -> success_rate=null / INSUFFICIENT_RECENT_EVIDENCE -> receipt-writer repair route).

diagnostic_canary_write_disclosure.sink_semantics: append-only terminal audit log; no TTL/cleanup; NOT read by liveness/dispatch/reconcile/recovery — cannot affect operational state
diagnostic_canary_write_disclosure.prior_receipt_correction: The first scratch receipt said the probe was fully read-only / 'no mutation occurred'. Corrected: operational mutation = none, but two diagnostic canary INSERTs were performed and are disclosed here.

causality: Recovery of the completion-evidence signal correlates with machine-reconcile / deadman probe / noos_integrator_repair activity ~03:39-03:50Z. Causation is NOT established (writer-B pre-gap cadence was already irregular 20-92min). No causal claim from chronological proximity.
recurrence_note: During implementation verification at ~2026-07-17T05:00Z the completion (writer-B) signal was stale again while dispatch was fresh — the new cockpit correctly reported DISPATCHING_COMPLETION_UNPROVEN for all 7 loops (success_rate=null, route=receipt_writer_completion_evidence_repair), demonstrating the fix on a live recurrence.
